description:
❌ No bias. No sales pitch.
✅ Just pure decoding - backed by research and India's top insurance experts.

Book Your Free Call
🔗 https://www.beshak.org/?&utm_source=YouTube&utm_campaign=Handle&utm_term=Hindi&utm_medium=KyayePlanDegaAapkoUnlimitedCoverFakeorRealICICILombardElevate

With Beshak Decoder, we break down complex health insurance plans and give you clear, personalised feedback - without the jargon or confusion.
🔗 https://www.beshak.org/insurance/health-insurance/health-insurance-plans/reviews/?&utm_source=YouTube&utm_campaign=Handle&utm_term=Hindi&utm_medium=KyayePlanDegaAapkoUnlimitedCoverFakeorRealICICILombardElevate

ICICI Lombard Elevate ka naam toh aapne suna hi hoga.

Unlimited Sum Insured, Power Booster, Infinite Care jaise features dekh ke kaafi log confused hote hain - “Yeh plan lena chahiye ya nahi?”

Aur isi confusion ko clear karne ke liye, hum laaye hain Beshak Decode ka honest, no-commission breakdown.

Iss video mein, Beshak ke Co-Founder aur Research Head Aayush Dubey (8+ saal ka experience insurance space mein), detail mein samjhaate hain ki ICICI Elevate sirf dikhne mein accha hai, ya actually worth hai ya nahi.

Key Highlights:
✅ "Unlimited Sum Insured" ka asli matlab kya hai (aur isme kya dikkat ho sakti hai)
✅ Infinite Care aur Power Booster jaise add-ons ke hidden conditions
✅ Aise clauses jo log usually miss kar dete hain
✅ Portability aur downgrade karne mein kya dikkat aa sakti hai
✅ Aur finally – kya yeh plan aapke liye sahi choice hai?

Video Chapters-
00:00 Introduction
01:54 USP 1: Unlimited Sum Insured
08:35 USP 2: Infinite Care
12:29 USP 3: Power Booster (Super Loyalty Bonus)
20:45 Product Rating
23:29 Claims Experience : Claims Incurred Ratio 
24:12 Claims Experience : Speed of Claim Settlement 
25:03 Claims Experience : Claim Complaints
25:49 Claim Experience Rating
27:04 Customer Service : Response time on Toll-Free
27:55 Customer Service : Response time on X (Twitter) 
28:56 Customer Service : % of Complaints received for after-sales service
29:40 Customer Service Rating 
30:42 Final Rating of the Product
31:43 Plan Premium and Premium Comparison with other Plans

Hum yeh plan bechne ke liye nahi, samjhane ke liye laaye hain.
Taaki aap bina confusion ke, confidently decision le sakein.

#icici #elevate #beshakdecodes #healthinsurance #review #insurance #podcast #icicilombard #explained #nocommissionreview #insuranceforfamily #smartinsurancebuying #claimexperience #customersupport #healthinsuranceindia

comments.text: Infinite care related conditions are clearly mentioned in their policy wording why you guys are portraying it as hidden condition ?
comments.author: @vishalsnowfall

comments.text: Hi! Just to clarify, “hidden condition” doesn’t mean the condition is hidden or missing from the policy wording. When a condition is unique, less common, or a bit complex, we highlight it separately because it can materially impact claims and how the cover works. Many people may not notice or fully understand such clauses at the time of buying, especially without expert guidance. The intent of the video is awareness and clarity, not to suggest that anything has been concealed by the insurer. Hope this clears.
comments.author: @camahavirchopra

comments.text:
लेकिन एक टाइम बाद ICICI बैंक add on का charge इतना बढ़ा देगी कि वो आप afford नहीं कर पाओगे और फिर जिस भी renewal पर आपने उस particular add on का premium नहीं भरा तो सब कुछ Zero हो जाएगा।
फिर आपकी सारी मेहनत बेकार , आपने इतने सालों तक बेनिफिट्स के चक्कर में add on का जितना भी प्रीमियम भरा वो भी बेकार।

सिर्फ पछताने के सिवाय हाथ में कुछ नहीं रहेगा फिर आप सोचोगे अब मैं कोई और कंपनी में पॉलिसी Port करा लेता हूँ। कंपनी शुरू में लालच देती है ताकि customer को product बेचा जा सके, और एक बार जब आप फंसे फिर कंपनी कस्टमर को अपने हिसाब से नाच नचाती है और यदि आप कंपनी के हिसाब से नहीं चले तो आपकी पूरी पॉलिसी आपके किसी काम की नहीं रहेगी।
comments.author: @All_Is_Well-v5v

comments.text: Hi! प्रेमियम हमेशा अनसर्टेन होते हैं, और हाँ - कुछ Add-on ऐसे होते हैं जिनके बेनिफिट्स आप उन्हें renew करना बंद कर दो तो स्टॉप या रीसेट हो जाते हैं। लेकिन इसका मतलब ये नहीं कि आपकी पूरी पॉलिसी ज़ीरो हो जाती है। सिर्फ उस Add-on के बेनिफिट्स ही ख़त्म होते हैं। इसी वजह से हम हमेशा कहते हैं कि पहले अपनी core coverage स्ट्रॉन्ग रखो, और flashy फीचर्स से प्रभावित मत हो। Add-on वही लो जो आपके long-term needs को सच में suit करें।
comments.author: @Beshak

comments.text: Very clearly these guys didn't mention the claim settlement ratio  of icici lombard which is 85 percent for last 4 years which is probably lowest among all top insurance companies
comments.author: @Yoyo12316

comments.text: Hi! In this video, we discussed only three key metrics for evaluating an insurer’s claim experience - speed of claim settlement, incurred claims ratio, and claim complaints. Of course, there are several other metrics like Claim Settlement Ratio (CSR) and claim rejection ratio that also help assess an insurer’s track record. As mentioned in the video, you can find a detailed breakdown of all these metrics on our Beshak Decoder. Also, we’ve also explained in our articles why CSR alone doesn’t always reflect the complete claim experience, and why looking at multiple parameters together gives a more balanced view. Article Link: https://www.beshak.org/insurance/opinion/articles/why-you-should-not-rely-on-claim-settlement-ratio/
comments.author: @camahavirchopra

comments.author: @yogendrakumaryadav8071

comments.text:
Hello, Policy wording ke hisaab se, Power Booster Super Loyalty Bonus ke taur par 100% of the expiring ya renewed Annual Sum Insured (jo bhi lower ho) har policy year ke end mein add kiya jaata hai chahe us saal koi claim hua ho ya nahi.
Ye Power Booster unlimited sum insured tak accumulate ho sakta hai.
Lekin dhyaan rahe ye optional cover un policies ke liye available nahi hai  jinke paas already unlimited annual sum insured hai.

comments.text: Agar 10 sal tak power Booster ke paise bharte hai our 11 ve saal me power booster add on  na le to kitna sum insured rahega 1 cr ya 10 lakh
comments.author: @niteshrathore676

comments.text: Hi! Power Booster (Super Loyalty Bonus) benefit ko har saal bina break renew karna zaroori hai. Agar aap iss add-on ka premium dena bandh kar dete ho ya iss add-on ko opt nahi karenge renewal ke time, toh jitna bhi accumulated bonus hai woh reset ho kar 0 ho jaata hai. Matlab agar aapka base cover 10 lakh tha aur bonus accumulate hoke 90 lakh ban gaya (total 1 crore), toh agle renewal mein agar aap Power Booster ka premium nahi doge toh woh 90 lakh bonus lapse ho jaayega, aur aapka total cover sirf 10 lakh hoga (assuming there is no other benefit or bonus).
